Name: RigidBodyParam
Description: Determines parameters related to the rigid body.

Fields.Name: Friction Coefficient
Fields.Description: Friction coefficient of the rigid body surface.

Fields.Name: Restitution Coefficient
Fields.Description: Elastic modulus of the rigid body.

Fields.Name: Maximum Speed
Fields.Description: Maxmum linear speed allowed for rigid bodies, in m/s.

Fields.Name: Maximum Angular Velocity
Fields.Description: Maximul angular speed allowed for rigid bodies, in degrees/frame.

Fields.Name: Gravity
Fields.Description: The gravity factor to apply to the rigid body.

Fields.Name: Soft Contact
Fields.Description: The soft contact factor to apply to the rigid body.

Fields.Name: Soft Contact Dampening
Fields.Description: The soft contact dampening factor to apply to the rigid body.
